# plane_state (Resource)

A workflow state within a Plane project.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `color` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `project_id` (String)
- `workspace_slug` (String)

### Optional

- `default` (Boolean)
- `group` (String) State group: `backlog`, `unstarted`, `started`, `completed`, `cancelled`, or `triage`. Defaults to `backlog` when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `project` (String)
- `workspace` (String)
